Thank you, Ruby, for your feedback!  Best wishes to you.  Look forward to working with you again.

We have 2 locations in southeastern North Carolina and offer classes in southeast Connecticut.  And, we are always willing to administer classes hosted at doctors', dentists', or construction contractors' offices, or community- and church-hosted programs.  Please call us (910) 395-5193 or visit our schedule at: https://bit.ly/3lN1L5c

reviews.comment: Brian and Nick made my BLS and ACLS recertification experience stress free with lots of laughs. I learned new skills that I didn’t previously acquire. I will definitely use them again for all my bls/acls needs and recommend them to friends and family!

reviewReply.comment: Thanks for the feedback, Megan!    We strive to make getting recerts as stress-free as possible.   We offer the most class dates/times in eastern North and northeastern South Carolina!  CCC may only answer the phone from 8 to 8, but if you cant find a date/time that meets your schedule, we will schedule a class any time 24 hours a day.
